rows.label: tev031202_MSG0001
rows.name:
This is taking far far too
long! What is that fool brother
of mine doing, anyway?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031202_MSG0002
rows.name:
Sostenasa is really
testing my patience...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031202_MSG0003
rows.name:
I trusted him with those repairs, you know?
And every extra second he takes drives me
just a bit further up the the wall.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031202_MSG0004
rows.name:
Say, would you do me a favor?
Can you maybe go find Sostenasa
and tell him to step on it?[ST:wait ]
